name: aca-native-mcp-skills
description: ACA Native MCP Skills: strategy, lead sourcing, outreach, deliverability, content, and operations through one ACA MCP connection.

interface.shortDescription: Run ACA outbound, content, and ops workflows through one MCP connection.
interface.longDescription: A publishable bundle of ACA skills for strategy, lead sourcing, campaign launch, deliverability, content production, reply scoring, and weekly operations. Requires a configured ACA MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Run ACA kickoff for my workspace.
Find and launch an ACA campaign.
Give me an ACA pipeline status brief.
